content.text: The user wants team mode enabled. I know the standard roles from prior context: CORE_MAKER for teatree work, OVERLAY_MAKER for acme work, REVIEWER for cold reviews. I'll spawn the panes now.

input.prompt: You are the CORE_MAKER pane. Own all teatree-repo work: open tickets, PRs, and merges. Work autonomously on the souliane/teatree repo.
